RAJU.speaker: RAJU
RAJU.why: Raju is a young Indian working-class man narrating his own rags-to-resourcefulness story in conversational Hindi, directly addressing camera. Siddhu is a young male standard Hindi voice that's casual and natural, matching the way people actually talk — perfect for a grounded, relatable, lean working man telling a personal jugaad story. Native Indian accent (default), correct gender and young age, and the everyday conversational tone fits the candid VO narration better than polished commercial or news voices.
RAJU.name: Siddhu - Reel & Sponsored Content
